title: Daily Routine Organizer
scenario: Write a simple Python function that takes a string input representing a person's daily routine, and outputs a Markdown-formatted schedule. The input string should be in the format 'time - activity'. The function should handle inputs with varying numbers of activities, and each activity should be listed on a new line in the Markdown schedule.

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should be syntactically valid Python code
The generated code should adhere to the given constraints (lines of code, Markdown formatting)
The generated code should correctly process the input and output a Markdown schedule
